caption:
准备好提升你的逻辑与表达能力了吗？辩论班诚邀每一位热爱思辨的你加入！在这里，言辞是武器，逻辑是盾牌，我们将与你一同在思想的碰撞中发掘潜能，共同开启这段充满智慧的旅程。

多媒体大学（赛城）第二十九届华文学会文学股辩论班【辩论招新讲座】即将举行！

无论你是零基础的初学者，还是渴望思想交锋的辩论爱好者，走进这场讲座，你将认识一个真实的辩论世界。加入我们，让观点碰撞思维，让辩论塑造未来！

【活动详情】
内容： 深入了解辩论、现场互动问答、开放报名校内辩论赛
日期： 04/05/2026（星期一）
时间： 8:30 PM – 10:30 PM
地点： CLC Lecture Theatre 5 (CNMX1005)

如有任何问题，请联络（WhatsApp）：
陈颂翎 011-1169 4306
陈芊伊 011-3312 0701

Are you ready to enhance your logic and communication skills? The Debate Class sincerely invites everyone who loves critical thinking to join us! Here, words are your weapons and logic is your shield. Together, we will discover your potential through the meaningful intellectual exchange and embark on this journey of wisdom.

The Debate Recruitment Talk for the 29th Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) Literature Division Debate Class is just around the corner!

Whether you are a beginner with zero experience or a debate enthusiast seeking deeper engagement, step into this talk to discover what debate truly is. Join us, let your ideas challenge perspectives, and let debate shape your future!

[Event Details]
Content: Discover the essence of debate, Live Q&A, and on-the-spot registration for the Internal Tournament.
Date: 04/05/2026 (Monday)
Time: 8:30 PM – 10:30 PM
Venue: CLC Lecture Theatre 5 (CNMX1005)

For any inquiries, please contact (WhatsApp):
Tan Yi Ling 011-1169 4306
Tan Chian Yee 011-3312 0701
